---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What's frustrating or missing today? Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like it to work. Be as specific as you can. -->

## Area of the App

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Furniture (new items, categories, behaviors)
- [ ] 3D viewport / rendering / camera
- [ ] 2D top-down view
- [ ] Walkthrough mode
- [ ] Walls (exterior / interior / openings / patterns)
- [ ] Floor management (multi-floor / switcher)
- [ ] Roof styles
- [ ] UI panels / sidebar / toolbar
- [ ] Catalog / search / filtering
- [ ] Themes / styles / colors
- [ ] Time of day / lighting
- [ ] Save / load / import / export
- [ ] Share / collaboration
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts / accessibility
- [ ] Mobile / touch support
- [ ] Performance / optimization
- [ ] Gamification / achievements
- [ ] Other

## User Story

<!-- Optional: describe it as a user story -->
<!-- As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [reason]. -->

## Screenshots / Mockups

<!-- Optional: sketches, mockups, reference images, or examples from other tools that illustrate the idea. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better? -->

## Impact

<!-- How many users would benefit? How often would this be used? -->

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use frequently
- [ ] Blocking my workflow

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other details, links, or references that might help. -->

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself (looking for guidance)
- [ ] I can help test a PR for this
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
